song.title: O Breath of God
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Breathe on me, Breath of God, Fill me with life anew, That I may love what Thou dost love, And do what Thou wouldst do.
[V2] 2) Breathe on me, Breath of God, Until my heart is pure, Until with Thee I will one will, To do and to endure.
[V3] 3) Breathe on me, Breath of God, Blend all my soul with Thine, Until this earthly part of me Glows with Thy fire divine.
[V4] 4) Breathe on me, Breath of God, So shall I never die, But live with Thee the perfect life Of Thine eternity.
song.author: Alfred H. Vine
